title: Universal Dyeing
description: Adds a bunch of crafting recipes that allow you to recolor dyed blocks and items such as candles or concrete
body:
Adds crafting recipes for recoloring concrete, concrete powder, terracotta, glass, glass panes, candles, banners and glazed terracotta.

For blocks, surround a dye of your choice with any color (or combination) block to recolor them

For banners and candles, place any candle/banner next to a piece of dye to recolor it
